Seven-headed hydra, each maw breathing different elements—fire scorching beside frost-bitten fangs beside bile-dripping poison, necks sprouting two where one falls, immortal.
Medusa crowned in writhing bronze-scaled vipers, her cracked-stone gaze petrifying warriors mid-scream, serpents hissing between fossilized victims at her feet.
Kraken rising from abyssal depths, tentacles thick as ship masts encrusted with ancient barnacles, lamprey-mouth ringed with hooked teeth, dragging civilizations below.
Chimera's patchwork body—lion mane matted with old blood, goat head bleating between shoulders, serpent tail coiling, all three mouths exhaling sulfurous flame.
Cerberus guarding Hades' gate, three massive heads with rot-black gums, flesh hanging from yellowed fangs, venom-saliva pooling where the damned cannot pass.
Jörmungandr encircling Midgard, world-serpent's barnacle-crusted scales grinding tectonic plates, venom drooling from fangs large as longships, tail swallowing its own beginning.
Sphinx perched on wind-worn stone, lion haunches rippling beneath sun-bleached fur, woman's face ancient as empires, vulture wings folded, eyes holding unanswerable riddles.
Manticore prowling with human face stretched over lion skull, scorpion tail bristling with bone-barbed quills launching like ballista bolts through armor and flesh.
Yamata-no-Orochi coiling through valleys, eight serpent heads weaving independently, eyes red as sake-drunk fury, eight tails crushing forests, demanding virgin sacrifice.
Wendigo towering skeletal-thin, emaciated flesh stretched over impossible height, elk skull crowned with frost-cracked antlers, eternally starving, smelling of decay and winter.
Basilisk serpent-king draped in golden crown-ridges, eyes twin suns of petrification, venom corroding stone where its scaled belly drags through forgotten crypts.
Fenrir straining against Gleipnir's unbreakable binding, wolf-giant with frost-burned fur, jaws wide enough to swallow moons, eyes like molten iron forges.
Scylla erupting from whirlpool-cave, six dog-headed necks snapping from woman's torso, tentacles lined with lamprey-mouths shredding sailors, barnacled and reef-scarred.
Naga rising coiled, seven cobra heads fanning jeweled hoods dripping ritual oils, bronze scales etched with Sanskrit curses, hypnotic dance preceding monsoon devastation.
Lamassu-bull with human bearded face weathered as Babylon's gates, eagle wings shedding bronze feathers, stone hooves cracking temple foundations with each guardian step.
Thunderbird mantling storm-black wings that eclipse horizons, lightning arcing between flight feathers, talons clutching whales, eyes swirling with hurricane pressure.
Tiamat coiling primordial, dragon-goddess birthing monsters from her flanks, scales like continental shelves, eleven demon-spawn nursing from her underbelly's cosmic wounds.
Oni towering red-skinned, triple-horned skull crowned with iron studs, tiger pelt loincloth stiff with dried blood, kanabo club embedded with shattered samurai swords.
Phoenix igniting from ash-heap, wings spreading molten feathers that set forests ablaze, eye sockets hollow flame, ribs showing through translucent burning flesh mid-resurrection.
Garuda descending divine, eagle-man with wingspan eclipsing temples, golden beak crushing nagas whole, talons scarred from millennia of serpent-wars, eyes blazing righteous hunger.
Minotaur fused with corroded bronze armor grown into hide, labyrinth-mapping scars across bull-skull, horns worn from scraping stone corridors, dragging axe through bone-piles.
Leviathan surfacing with scales thick as fortress walls, each plate barnacled and reef-encrusted, jaw unhinging to swallow whales whole, ancient beyond ocean memory.
Typhon erupting hundred dragon-heads from volcanic shoulders, each neck breathing different catastrophe, legs coiled serpents crushing mountains, father of all monsters awakening.
Cyclops hammering in volcanic forge, single eye glowing like molten core, soot-blackened flesh scarred from divine lightning, crafting thunder itself on obsidian anvil.
Lamia coiling serpentine lower-half thick as temple columns, woman's torso withered by curse, brass-scaled and jewel-draped, draining children with hypnotic song and venom kiss.
Dragon-wyrm hoarding gold-crusted scales, four legs terminating in sword-length talons, horned skull leaking sulfur-smoke, wings membrane-torn from centuries guarding cursed treasure.
Grendel lurking mere-depths, humanoid colossus with algae-matted hair, flesh pale as drowned corpses, claws ripping mead-hall timbers, immune to mortal blades, devouring warriors whole.
Fury descending on bronze-feathered wings, serpents replacing hair and lashing from skull, wielding barbed whips dripping blood, eyes empty sockets weeping eternal vengeance.
Eastern dragon undulating cloud-serpentine, nine body segments scaled in jade and pearl, antlered head whiskered ancient-wise, claws never touching earth, breathing storm and fortune.
Tsuchigumo spider-demon bloated massive, human face stretched across arachnid skull, eight legs thick as trees ending in blade-points, weaving caves with silk that digests samurai.
Qilin striding on storm-hooves, dragon-scaled head crowned with single antler sprouting moss, ox-tail dragging flames, body patchwork of sacred beasts judging the worthy.
Sleipnir galloping eight-legged, Odin's steed with ribs showing through grave-pale hide, eyes rolled white, hoofprints burning runes into battlefields, breath mist of the hanged.
Ammit crouching beside scales of Ma'at, crocodile jaws over lion haunches over hippo hindquarters, devouring unworthy hearts whole, teeth stained with soul-residue and failure.
Grootslang coiling in Wonder Hole depths, primordial elephant-serpent hybrid with tusks long as pillars, scaled trunk crushing diamonds, split by gods for being too powerful.
Nue prowling temple roofs, monkey face snarling over tiger's striped body, serpent tail dripping venom, limbs tangled fox-raccoon, bringing plague-clouds and imperial nightmares.
Caladrius perched over deathbeds, pure white heron with eyes like cataract moons, turning from the doomed, staring into the savable, absorbing sickness into bone-hollow frame.
Baku devouring nightmares, elephant trunk tapir-long over bear body with tiger legs, tusks carved with dream-script, eyes empty voids pulling terror from sleeping skulls nightly.
Piasa mantling from Mississippi bluffs, dragon wings over human-faced elk body, antlers branching copper-green, tail spiked and coiling, dive-bombing canoes with meteor-speed hunger.
Ziz perched eclipsing sun, cosmic bird with wingspan shadowing nations, talons gripping mountain peaks like kindling, Leviathan's sky-counterpart, feathers falling like temple columns.
Nuckelavee surfacing skinless, horse-man fusion with muscles exposed and pulsing, single cyclopean eye, toxic breath wilting crops, veins black with concentrated ocean pestilence.
Tengu descending mountain-peaks, crow-winged warrior with elongated demon-mask nose, iron-tipped feathers sharp as katanas, ancient yamabushi robes tattered, eyes burning with martial judgment.

Wendigo-chimera variant towering gaunt, deer skull cracked lengthwise exposing brain-ice, arms ending in shattered-bone talons, spine piercing through translucent frost-burned skin, eternally ravenous.
Siren flock roosting on corpse-slick rocks, vulture wings mantling over woman torsos, mouths distended mid-song revealing lamprey-rings, sailor bones woven into nests below.
Naga-queen coiling nine cobra necks from single jeweled torso, each hood tattooed with glowing Sanskrit, bronze scales shedding venom-mist, lower body thick as temple foundations crushing.
Basilisk-drake crowned with crystallized venom forming golden ridges, gaze calcifying flesh instantly, serpentine body armored in petrified-victim scales, breath corroding iron to rust-dust.
Chimera-alpha with lion head scarred bald, three goat skulls erupting from spine, hydra-serpent tail splitting into venom-fanged branches, pelt stitched from different epoch's beasts.

Typhon manifesting hundred wyrm-heads sprouting from volcanic torso, each neck breathing separate apocalypse—plague, flame, tsunami—legs coiled continent-crushing serpents writhing, primordial storm-father awakening.

Dragon-Eastern immortal undulating nine-segmented body jade-scaled and cloud-wreathed, antlered skull whiskered with lightning, pearl-clutching claws never grounding, eyes ancient as dynasties, fortune-bringing catastrophe.

Cerberus-variant with three rotted bull-mastiff heads, necks studded with embedded swords from failed crossings, venom-foam hissing on stone, spines protruding through hell-scorched hide guarding abyss-gates.

Medusa-matriarch with hair of bronze-scaled king cobras coiling arm-thick, face beautiful as cracked marble statues, petrifying gaze turning armies to calcified forests, standing among victim-monuments.
